name: rotisserie-chicken
input: a quarter of a rotisserie chicken with skin
notes: USDA FoodData Central #5152 (chicken, broiler/fryer, roasted, meat + skin): ~239 kcal per 100g. Quarter rotisserie ~160g cooked weight ≈ 380 kcal, P 36g, F 26g. Justification for critical-tier promotion: stable USDA reference, common Western dinner staple, zero carb/fiber tests divide-by-zero tolerance edge.
